name: upf-to-json
documentation:
# UPF to JSON converter

UPF is a file format to describe atomic pseudo-potentials used by (DFT) density
functional theory codes. This package provides scripts for converting UPF v1 and
UPF v2 (Unified Pseudopotential Format) to json format as required by the SIRIUS
DFT library [SIRIUS github](https://github.com/electronic-structure/SIRIUS).


More information about the unified pseudopotential format can be found here:
https://www.quantum-espresso.org/pseudopotentials/unified-pseudopotential-format

functions.name: upf_to_json.upf_tools.info
documentation: from upf_to_json import upf_to_json

functions.name: upf_to_json.upf_tools.convert
documentation: Convert UPF to json format.

functions.name: upf_to_json.upf_to_json.upf_to_json
documentation:
Convert UPF to python dictionary.

```
param upf_str

upf as string

param fname

filename of the original .UPF file
```

functions.name: upf_to_json.upf2_to_json.parse_pswfc
documentation: ############ Read starting wave functions #########

functions.name: upf_to_json.upf2_to_json.parse_upf2_from_string
documentation: wfc_num = upf_dict['header']['number_of_wfc']
for i in range(wfc_num):
node = root.findall("./PP_SPIN_ORB/PP_RELWFC.%i"%(i+1))[0]
upf_dict['paw_data']['ae_wfc']['ae_wfc_rel'] = float(node)
upf_dict['paw_data']['ae_wfc']['total_angular_momentum'] = float(node('jchi'))
upf_dict['paw_data']['ps_wfc']['total_angular_momentum'] = float(node('jchi'))
